subcodes.first_line: God willing, through His grace, mayest thou be detached from creation and hold fast unto Him. Turn thy gaze away from the peoples of the world and [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: انشاء الله بعنایت حق از خلق منقطع باشی و باو متمسک و متشبث چشم از عالمیان بردار و
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual transformation, @wine as symbol of spiritual transformation, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world
